hero.badge: Wrap Up Every Session with Ease
hero.heading: Post-Session Tools
hero.description: Keep every client interaction organized, documented, and accessible. Your Virtual AI Assistant makes it effortless to record notes, voice memos, and attachments after each session — building a complete client history that improves service quality and saves you time.

keyCapabilities.heading: Key Capabilities:
keyCapabilities.description: Smart tools that help you stay organized, informed, and always ready for the next appointment.

cards.title: 1. Client Notes
cards.description: Add written notes after each appointment.

cards.title: 2. Voice Memos
cards.description: Record a quick voice memo instead of typing, it's transcribed, summerised and attached automatically

cards.title: 3. Photos & Documents
cards.description: Upload forms, images, or documents directly to the client's record.

cards.title: 4. Complete Client History
cards.description: All notes, memos, and documents stay attached to each appointment, making future sessions smoother and more personalised

points.label: Reduce Admin Time:
points.text: Save hours every week by replacing manual note-taking and filing.

points.label: Improve Accuracy:
points.text: Automatic organization reduces the risk of missing or misplaced data.

points.label: Enhance Client Trust:
points.text: Clients appreciate your precision and recall in follow-ups.

points.label: Ensure Continuity:
points.text: Perfect for multi-staff environments or long-term client relationships.

points.label: Boost Professionalism:
points.text: Arrive at every session prepared and informed.

image.alt: Gears and clock illustration representing productivity

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.subheading: A simple three-step process to keep every session organized.

steps.title: Instant Support
steps.description: Clients get the answers they need immediately, even after hours.

steps.title: Reduced Admin Load
steps.description: Fewer phone calls and emails for your team to handle.

steps.title: Higher Conversion Rates
steps.description: Clients feel confident booking after getting clear, helpful information.

finalCta.heading: Ready to Streamline Your Follow-Ups?
finalCta.description: Let your AI handle post-session management — from note-taking to file organization. Focus on your clients, not your paperwork.
